attempts.summary: Used sec_analytics incidents detector over 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-15. It excludes documented benign patterns. One real incident surfaced: large-scale failed login attempts from a single external IP across many accounts, consistent with credential stuffing.

answer.evidence: 520 failed logins across 118 users between 2026-04-13 and 2026-04-15, consistent with credential stuffing.
